message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "objective": "Ensure the return or destruction of Company data upon termination of the Agreement.",
      "leverage": "The Company has a vested interest in protecting its data and ensuring compliance with data protection regulations.",
      "proposed_language": "Upon termination or expiration of this Agreement, the Developer shall return or securely destroy all Company data and personal information within 30 days.",
      "rationale": "This ensures that the Company retains control over its data and mitigates risks associated with data breaches or misuse after the contract ends.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "objective": "Clarify the definition of 'Services' to ensure comprehensive coverage.",
      "leverage": "A clear definition helps avoid misunderstandings and ensures all necessary services are included.",
      "proposed_language": "The term 'Services' shall include all professional services necessary for the successful implementation and maintenance of the software, including but not limited to system analysis, program development, personnel training, documentation writing, general business consulting, and ongoing support.",
      "rationale": "This broadens the scope of services and ensures that the Company receives all necessary support for the software.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "objective": "Shorten the notification period for Data Breaches.",
      "leverage": "Timely notification is critical for the Company to mitigate potential damages from a Data Breach.",
      "proposed_language": "In the event of a Data Breach, the Developer shall notify the Company within 24 hours of becoming aware of the breach.",
      "rationale": "This allows the Company to respond quickly to protect its data and comply with legal obligations.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.80
    },
    {
      "objective": "Define clear requirements and deliverables for the custom software development.",
      "leverage": "Clear requirements prevent scope creep and ensure that the Developer delivers what the Company needs.",
      "proposed_language": "The requirements for the custom software shall be clearly defined and documented in a Requirements Specification Document, which must be approved by the Company prior to the commencement of development.",
      "rationale": "This ensures that both parties have a mutual understanding of the project scope and deliverables.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.90
    },
    {
      "objective": "Establish a structured approval process for programming specifications.",
      "leverage": "A structured process ensures that the Company has adequate oversight and control over the development process.",
      "proposed_language": "The Developer shall submit programming specifications for approval by the Company, which shall have 10 business days to review and provide feedback. The Developer shall incorporate any feedback and resubmit for final approval.",
      "rationale": "This allows for iterative feedback and ensures that the final product meets the Company's expectations.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.78
    }
  ]
}
